name: podcast-outline
description: Build a complete podcast episode outline with a scroll-stopping hook, timed segments, discussion questions, and an outro CTA.
input_description: Episode topic, target audience, guest name or solo episode, episode length (e.g., 30 min, 60 min), and any key talking points to cover.
output_description: Full episode outline with intro hook script, timestamped segment breakdown, talking points per segment, transition notes, and a word-for-word outro CTA.
